rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE WILLIAMS FAMILY TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order To Invalidate The Williams Family Trust Of Betty Yvonne Williams And Leroy Williams And To Remove The Appointed Trustee, Shawny K. Willimas Under Unde Influence And Perjury And Appoint Pltf As New Trustee
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Procedural issues with petition: 1) At least 30 days before the time set for hearing on the petition, the petitioner shall cause notice of the hearing to be delivered pursuant to Section 1215 to all trustees and all beneficiaries (Probate Code Section 17203). Form DE-120 is required for this proceeding. 2) All notices must include language about remote appearances (San Francisco Local Rule 14.1.C.6). 3) A petition involving a trust must state the names and last known addresses of all vested or contingent beneficiaries (CRC 7.902). 4) No proposed order has been received (San Francisco Local Rule 14.7.A). Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE JESUS O. PULE AND AMALIA PULE LIVING TRUST TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition (1) For A Report Of The Trust And Its Administration; 2) For An Accounting 3) For An Order To Distribute Trust Assets; 4) For Damages Due To
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 4/14/26. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) A copy of an unfiled notice of hearing received by the examiner shows a hearing date of 1/26/26, not 1/21/26, the proof of service on the reverse side of that notice of hearing was not properly verified, a printout of the instructions for how to appear remotely was not attached to the notice, and the proof of service indicates that notice was mailed on 1/7/26, which was still not 30 days' notice. (2) Courtesy copies are file stamped, single-sided, hard copies. [LRSF 14.7 B. and C.] Other unfiled papers received by the examiner have not been fully reviewed. Deadline for providing courtesy copies to the assigned examiner of any responsive papers is 3/30/26. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JESSIE NELL TURNER
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 4/1/26. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) No proof of publication of the second amended petition has been filed. [CRC 7.53(a).] (2) The proof of service filed on 12/17/25 was incomplete at item 4 and shows that it was verified on 12/16/25, before the second amended petition was filed. (3) The notice was also incomplete at items 3 and 10. (It is unclear what the purpose was of all the attachments to the notice, but only the instructions for remote appearance (the last two pages) were required to be attached to the notice.) (4) Items 2b and 2d of the second amended petition are incomplete. (5) Item 3e(2) of the second amended petition does not apply, as there is no will. The heirs have not waived bond. (6) Item 3g(2)(c) of the second amended petition is incomplete. (7) The children, who are the heirs, have priority before a grandchild. They must either decline to serve or nominate the petitioner. (8) Item 7 does not need to be completed if a decedent is survived by issue. Please provide courtesy copies of any new papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 3/20/26. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF KATHRYN E BASS
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 4/7/26. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) A second amended petition was just filed on 1/9/26 (e-filed on 1/13/26), which was not at least 15 days before this hearing. (2) An amended pleading requires the same notice as the pleading it amends, including publication. [CRC 7.53.] Please provide courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 1/7/26. Courtesy copies are file stamped, single-sided, hard copies. [LRSF 14.7 B. and C.] Copies of unfiled papers are not reviewed. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF GERARD VAN DIST
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required, although the following notice issues remain unaddressed: 1) Each successor of Renee Siffert, a postdeceased cousin/heir of the decedent, must be identified to give notice. 2) Each successor of Claude Debaisieux, a postdeceased cousin/heir of the decedent, must be identified to give notice. 3) The date of death of Brigitte Hupez, the decedent's cousin once removed who allegedly died after 1973, has not been ascertained. If Brigitte predeceased the decedent, her issue entitled to notice must be identified. If Brigitte survived the decedent, her successors must be identified to give notice. 4) The whereabouts of Philippe Hupez, the decedent's cousin once removed/heir entitled to notice, must be ascertained to give notice. 5) The surviving issue of Yvon Flament, the decedent's cousin/heir, must be identified to give notice. 6) The surviving issue of Marcel Flament, the decedent's cousin/heir, must be identified to give notice. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.
